heading: Retired Reserve
label: 12307 Retired Reserve
text: A member in the Retired Reserve may, if qualified, be ordered to active duty without his consent, but only as provided in section 688 or 12301(a) of this title. A member of the Retired Reserve (other than a member transferred to the Retired Reserve under ) who is ordered to active duty or other appropriate duty in a retired status may be credited under chapter 1223 of this title with service performed pursuant to such order. A member in a retired status is not eligible for promotion (or for consideration for promotion) as a Reserve.section 12641(b) of this title

A member in a retired status is not eligible for promotion (or for consideration for promotion) as a Reserve.”Pub. L. 101–189section 1001(b) of this title1983— inserted reference to section 688.Pub.
